headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on KLA, Raises Price Target to $2064
summary: Citigroup  analyst Atif Malik   maintains KLA (NASDAQ:KLAC) with a Buy and raises the price target from $1800 to $2064.

headline: Morgan Stanley resets KLA Corp stock forecast
summary: KLA Corporation (KLAC) has become one of Wall Street’s more closely watched semiconductor-equipment names as investors look for companies tied to the buildout of artificial intelligence infrastructure. The company makes process-control and process-enabling tools used in semiconductor manufacturing, ...

headline: KLA Corp (NASDAQ:KLAC) Passes Caviar Cruise Quality Screen with Stellar Fundamentals
summary: KLA Corp passes the Caviar Cruise quality stock screener with strong revenue growth, 87.85% ROIC, low debt, and 96.92% profit quality. A top pick for long-term value investors.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider KLA (KLAC) After A 161% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether KLA at around US$1,750 per share still offers value after a strong run, you are not alone. The stock has returned 18.9% over the last 30 days and 37.3% year to date, while the 1 year return of 160.8% and a very large 3 year gain suggest sentiment has shifted meaningfully, even with a 3.6% pullback over the past week. Recent coverage has highlighted how KLA sits at the center of key semiconductor trends and industry spending cycles, with investors paying close...
